profile.name: Hi, I'm YOHANN!
profile.title: My full name is Yohann CHAN CHEW HONG and welcome to my little corner of the internet!

home.aboutText:
I am a Data Scientist and GEN AI developer based in Paris, France.

I create digital tools and business solutions across web, UX/UI, and explore visual storytelling through photography and video, often after a gravel ride
home.toolsSubtitle: Explore my collection of utility tools and applications.
home.footerBuilt: Built with <3 in Vue.js & Tailwind CSS

toolbox.title: TOOLS COLLECTION
toolbox.subtitle: A curated set of small, purposeful tools

hawkMcp.title: HAWK MCP
hawkMcp.desc: A powerful local AI orchestrator using MCP (Model Context Protocol) and Ollama. Runs entirely offline on your machine, providing a terminal-based assistant that can control your system, manage files, launch apps, and more.
hawkMcp.figcaption: Terminal-based AI assistant with system control

hawkMobile.title: HAWK AI MOBILE
hawkMobile.desc: A lightweight personal assistant mobile app built with React Native and Expo, powered by Google's Gemini AI. Features a clean, modern chat interface with customizable themes and multi-language support.

pixelWidgets.title: GOOGLE PIXEL WIDGETS
pixelWidgets.desc: A collection of Android Home Screen widgets inspired by the Pixel aesthetic, built using Jetpack Glance.

pdf.title: PDF TOOLS
pdf.desc: Compress, split, and extract PDF pages. Fast and local.

tictactoe.title: TIC TAC TOE
tictactoe.desc: A minimal Tic Tac Toe to unwind on the go. Play against a friend or the computer.

flipcoin.title: FLIP COIN
flipcoin.desc: A playful 3D coin to help you decide. Heads or tails?

rag.title: RAG CHATBOT
rag.desc: Ask your documents questions with vector search and an LLM‑powered assistant.

toolbox.comingSoonText: More tools are in the works. Check back soon.

gallery.title: GALLERY
gallery.subtitle: A curated selection of my photography. High-res images served via CDN. If you wish to use any photo, please contact me first.
gallery.noPhotos: No photos yet. Populate public/gallery/index.json with image entries.

home.subtitle: AI-assisted frontends, small tools, and photography projects.

hero.displayText: Every text displayed in the front

about.title: ABOUT THE STUDIO

items.title: MSC IN DATA SCIENCE & AI
items.org: DATA SCIENCETECH INSTITUTE - SCHOOL OF ENGINEERING

items.title: BACHELOR'S IN ECONOMICS (DATA SCIENCE CMI ENGINEER TRACK)
GENERAL BACCALAUREATE IN MATHEMATICS AND ECONOMICS
GEN AI DEVELOPER
items.description: Contributed to IT system renewal by implementing 10 Gen AI business and employee use cases in production. Designed FastAPI APIs responsible for the micro-service orchestrating workflow of use cases following hexagonal architecture. Developed TypeScript/Vue front-end micro-fronts for the Gen AI platform. Managed versions with GitLab, performed debugging, wrote unit tests to ensure code quality and ran CI pipelines. Continuous monitoring of Gen AI developments and industry updates.

items.title: AMAZON STOREFRONT MANAGER
items.description: Managed listings via Seller Central with autonomous optimization based on product files and sales data.

items.title: WEBMASTER
items.description: Created Beemada.online website (WordPress, HTML/CSS), managed integration and deployment.
